entityTypes.name: doc_updates
entityTypes.description: Documentation update records tracking which files were changed and the associated PR

implementation_ref.description: Reference to the implementation plan or PR that triggered this doc update

doc_type.description: Type of documentation updated: readme, api-docs, guide, or changelog

files_updated.description: List of documentation file paths that were modified

pr_url.description: URL of the documentation pull request

entityTypes.name: doc_findings
entityTypes.description: Documentation gap findings identifying areas where docs are missing, outdated, or incorrect

gap_type.description: Type of documentation gap: missing, outdated, incorrect, or none

affected_area.description: Module, feature, or section affected by the documentation gap

priority.description: Gap priority: low, medium, or high

description.description: Description of the documentation gap and what needs to be addressed
